name: Chocolate Oatmeal Cookies #3
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the brown sugar and butter until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Stir in vanilla extract.
4. Gradually add baking soda and flour, mixing until just combined.
5. Fold in oatmeal and mix until evenly distributed.
6. Gently fold in chocolate chips.
7. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of the dough onto an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks.
